mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(A.ANIMAL_ID) AS id, A.ANIMAL_NAME AS title, A.BREED AS subText, I.SAVE_FILE_NAME AS imageName FROM ANIMAL A LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_IMAGE I ON A.ANIMAL_ID = I.ANIMAL_ID AND I.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE A.ANIMAL_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY A.ANIMAL_NAME FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
SELECT MEMBER_ID AS id, NICKNAME AS title, EMAIL AS subText, PROFILE_IMG AS imageName FROM MEMBER WHERE NICKNAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY NICKNAME FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
SELECT TO_CHAR(SUPPORT_ID) AS id, TITLE AS title, MEMBER_ID AS subText, NULL AS imageName FROM SUPPORT WHERE TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY CREATE_DATE DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
